message:
🐛 Fix GPU NaN% in Resource Allocation card (#2785)

gpuAllocated can be undefined on nodes where GPU allocation data
isn't available from the metrics API. The reduce sum propagated
undefined as NaN through the percentage calculation.

Added || 0 guards on both gpuCount and gpuAllocated in the
accelerator sum reducer.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
